title: Binary autoresponder / OOO detection
note: Frozen regression for the binary auto-reply filter. SYNTHETIC replies, unambiguous true/false gold. This mode gates a downstream pipeline, so consistency matters — pass^k (all k trials correct) is the load-bearing metric here, not just mean accuracy.
input_template:
Classify whether this email reply is an automated / out-of-office autoresponder (true) or a genuine human-written reply (false).

Respond with ONLY a JSON object {"automated_reply": true} or {"automated_reply": false} — no prose, no markdown fences.

Reply:
{{body}}

vars.body: Automatic reply: I am out of the office until July 14 with limited access to email. For urgent matters please contact my assistant.
Thank you for your message. I am currently on parental leave and will return in September. Your email will not be forwarded.
I'm away from my desk attending a conference this week and will respond upon my return.
This is an automated response confirming we received your inquiry. A representative will contact you shortly.
Out of office: traveling internationally with intermittent email access until further notice.
Hi, thanks for reaching out. We're actually evaluating a few vendors right now, can you share pricing?
Please take me off your distribution list. Not interested.
This sounds interesting. Do you have time for a quick call Thursday afternoon?
We already use a similar tool, but check back with me next budget cycle in the fall.
Who gave you my email? I did not sign up for this.
